GM:(0,0,0)  R:(1/2,0,1/2)  S:(0,1/2,1/2)  SA:(0,1/2,-1/2)  T:(-1/2,1/2,0)  W:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  X:(1,1,1)
GM:(0,0,0)  L:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  A:(0,0,1/2)  M:(0,1,1/2)  V:(1/2,1/2,0)  U:(0,-1/2,1/2)  Y:(0,1,0)
